text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
2 
CONTRACT_ID 
LABEL: 
Part D Contract Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS. 

This field is a key that links of Part D sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: CONTRACT_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
5-digit alpha/numeric value 
COMMENT:
